subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of holiness that have been sent down by One Who is Mighty and All-Wise. They guide mankind unto the dominion of grace and bestow sustenance upon them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات القدس قد نزلت من لدن عزیز حکیم و یهدی الناس الی جبروت الفضل و یرزقهم
subcodes.subjects: @the power of words; of speech, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
